claims.claim: Model**: Qwen2.5-7B, Q4_K_M quantization, served via llama.cpp.

evidence_refs.quote: We report empirical evidence on the reliability of landmark-based prefiltering versus model-guarded full-chunk retrieval in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines. Using a Qwen2.5-7B Q4_K_M model-backed benchmark (8 scenarios per condition) and a local SQLite FTS5 RAG backend, we observe that landmark-only accuracy degrades substantially when synthetic examples contain decoy or mixed landmarks: from 0.8125 on naive examples to 0.5000 on reliability-adversarial examples in the model-backe
